identity: Young male seer, slender lean adult build. Medium-length wavy golden-copper hair (warm orange-brown) falling past the shoulders. Eyes are the critical identifier: GLOWING CYAN-BLUE ALMOND-SHAPED EYES with no visible pupil or iris, just pure cyan-blue luminance with a soft glowing halo. Clean-shaven, fair pale skin, serene adult male face (distinctly masculine jaw).
outfit: Flowing pale cream and ivory-white robe with soft gold embroidery along the hem and sleeves, a thin leather belt at the waist, a translucent pale-blue shawl over one shoulder. Simple leather sandals.
weapons: A slender pale wooden staff with a small glowing cyan-blue crystal set at the top, held in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing profile, hood still up. Right arm thrust forward, palm open, a thin beam of cool cyan-white light extending from her fingertips. Left hand drawn back near hip, fingers curled. No held object. Hair lifts slightly from the energy release; robe hem swirls. CRITICAL: character must be MID-STRIKE, clearly in motion — weapon in the middle of a swing, thrust, shot, or spell-cast, NOT an idle/battle-ready stance. Pose must be visually distinct from the east idle.
spellStyle: East-facing profile, hood still up. Both hands raised at shoulder height, palms up and cupped together. A glowing ring-rune of cyan-white light hovers above her open palms. Head tilted slightly back, cyan eye-glow brighter than normal. Robe hem floats gently.
blockStyle: East-facing profile, hood still up. Crossed forearms in front of chest, palms outward, a shimmering translucent ward of pale cyan light forming between her arms. Shoulders squared, chin down, eyes narrowed but still glowing cyan.
koStyle: East-facing, slumped on her knees on the ground. Both arms limp, hands resting on the ground in front of her. Head bowed, hood still up but tilted forward, golden hair fallen forward covering most of her face. Eye-glow dimmed to a faint cool-cyan smudge behind the hair. Robe pooled around her knees.
southStyle: Facing the camera (south), full body, hood still up, calm idle stance. Hands clasped loosely at her abdomen. Cyan glowing eyes front and center, golden hair framing the face, gold circlet visible below the hood's edge.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, facing slightly off-camera three-quarter view, neutral serene expression. Hood UP. Gold circlet with teardrop gem visible on forehead. CYAN GLOWING ALMOND EYES must read clearly as the first thing you notice. Golden hair flows out of the hood on both sides.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Young male seer, slender lean adult build. Medium-length wavy golden-copper hair (warm orange-brown) falling past the shoulders. Eyes are the critical identifier: GLOWING CYAN-BLUE ALMOND-SHAPED EYES with no visible pupil or iris, just pure cyan-blue luminance with a soft glowing halo. Clean-shaven, fair pale skin, serene adult male face (distinctly masculine jaw).

OUTFIT: Flowing pale cream and ivory-white robe with soft gold embroidery along the hem and sleeves, a thin leather belt at the waist, a translucent pale-blue shawl over one shoulder. Simple leather sandals.

WEAPONS: A slender pale wooden staff with a small glowing cyan-blue crystal set at the top, held in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies 281px of the 400px canvas height (~70%). Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle, arms relaxed at sides (for humanoids) or four legs planted (for quadrupeds). Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Young male seer, slender lean adult build. Medium-length wavy golden-copper hair (warm orange-brown) falling past the shoulders. Eyes are the critical identifier: GLOWING CYAN-BLUE ALMOND-SHAPED EYES with no visible pupil or iris, just pure cyan-blue luminance with a soft glowing halo. Clean-shaven, fair pale skin, serene adult male face (distinctly masculine jaw).

OUTFIT: Flowing pale cream and ivory-white robe with soft gold embroidery along the hem and sleeves, a thin leather belt at the waist, a translucent pale-blue shawl over one shoulder. Simple leather sandals.

WEAPONS: A slender pale wooden staff with a small glowing cyan-blue crystal set at the top, held in the right hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, facing slightly off-camera three-quarter view, neutral serene expression. Hood UP. Gold circlet with teardrop gem visible on forehead. CYAN GLOWING ALMOND EYES must read clearly as the first thing you notice. Golden hair flows out of the hood on both sides.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): the Oracle must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70% of the canvas. Do NOT stretch or upscale the figure to fill the frame. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct and preserves scale relative to other species. Feet (or lowest point of body for KO / quadruped) aligned near the bottom.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference portrait at images/portraits/oracle.png.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in to fill the canvas — respect SCALE.

south.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Young male seer, slender lean adult build. Medium-length wavy golden-copper hair (warm orange-brown) falling past the shoulders. Eyes are the critical identifier: GLOWING CYAN-BLUE ALMOND-SHAPED EYES with no visible pupil or iris, just pure cyan-blue luminance with a soft glowing halo. Clean-shaven, fair pale skin, serene adult male face (distinctly masculine jaw).

OUTFIT: Flowing pale cream and ivory-white robe with soft gold embroidery along the hem and sleeves, a thin leather belt at the waist, a translucent pale-blue shawl over one shoulder. Simple leather sandals.

WEAPONS: A slender pale wooden staff with a small glowing cyan-blue crystal set at the top, held in the right hand.

POSE (south): Facing the camera (south), full body, hood still up, calm idle stance. Hands clasped loosely at his abdomen. Cyan glowing eyes front and center, golden hair framing the face, gold circlet visible below the hood's edge.

FRAMING (non-negotiable): FULL-BODY shot head-to-toe, facing camera (south). Entire figure fits inside the 256x256 canvas: feet fully visible with ~6-8% clearance above the bottom edge (NEVER cropped, NEVER cut off), head with ~6-8% headroom above the hair (NEVER cropped). Figure occupies ~85% of canvas height (approximately 180-200 px of the 256 px canvas), centered horizontally. Match cross-roster scale: same pixel height as every other adult humanoid in this sprite set. The body — shoulders, torso, arms, legs — should fill a normal adult-human silhouette width (do NOT compress laterally into a thin vertical sliver).

BODY PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): realistic adult human head-to-body ratio (~1/7.5), slender lean adult build with long adult legs, normal adult shoulder width. Not chibi, not bobblehead.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference portrait at images/portraits/oracle.png.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in to fill the canvas — respect SCALE.
south.sizeNote: 186x186 — flagged: SpriteCook /pixel returned slightly-smaller than canonical 200x200; canvas drawImage scales to fixed rect so visual parity preserved. Review on approval page.
